articles.title: First Look at the Concrete Boys x Nike Air Force 1 Mid
articles.summary: Name: Concrete Boys x Nike Air Force 1 MidSKU: TBCRelease Date: 2026First look at images of Lil Yachty's Concrete Boys x Nike Air Force 1 Mid sneaker has surfaced. As previewed by @historyofmyworld93tilnow on Instagram, the photos reveal a fully texturized design with an unapologetically raw aesthetic.This mid-cut silhouette embraces a rugged, concrete-inspired look wrapped entirely in a shaggy, grey felt textile. Reminiscent of the eco-conscious materials popularized by Nike's defunct 2020 Space Hippie program, the distinct fabrication features a complex weave of tonal grey threads subtly interspersed with microscopic flecks of color. This gives the sneaker a tactile finish reminiscent of industrial packing materials or rugged insulation. This fuzzy textile treatment dominates the shoe's

articles.title: The Nike Mind 002 "Camo Green" Tones Everything Down for Fall 2026
articles.summary: Name: Nike Mind 002 “Camo Green”Colorway: Camo Green/Phantom-NewsprintSKU: HQ4308-300MSRP: $145 USDRelease Date: Fall 2026Nike is releasing the Mind 002 in "Camo Green" for Fall 2026. The unisex release takes a quieter approach than earlier Mind 002 pairs, most visibly in the decision to match the pressure-point pods to the rest of the shoe rather than using the bright orange that has defined the silhouette's most recognizable colorways.The pod swap is the colorway's central design statement. The Mind 002's columned midsole and podded outsole have typically appeared in a contrasting color that draws attention to the shoe's neuroscience-backed pressure-point system, making the recovery technology visible as an aesthetic feature. The "Camo Green" abandons that approach entirely, running the

articles.title: The Nike Dunk Low "Old Royal" Uses Suede Overlays to Separate Itself From the Blue-and-White Crowd
articles.summary: Name: Nike Dunk Low “Old Royal”Colorway: Old Royal/Photon Dust-WhiteSKU: IO4244-400MSRP: $120 USDRelease Date: Summer 2026Nike is releasing the Dunk Low "Old Royal" for Summer 2026. The colorway arrives in "Old Royal, Photon Dust, and White and makes its case through material rather than color: suede overlays in place of the leather typically found in this construction zone, giving a familiar blue-and-white blocking more textural depth than a standard two-tone Dunk Low delivers.The material split is where the design work lives. Photon Dust leather covers the toe box, side panels, and collar, laying down a soft off-white base across the upper's largest surfaces. articles.summary: SUMMARYAPB introduces its Fall/Winter 2026 collection through a localized campaign featuring Charlotte rapper Reuben VincentThe seasonal rollout consists of APB’s latest apparel capsule alongside collaborations with Nike and Jordan BrandThe campaign also offers a glimpse into the retailer's new Music Series, which will launch with Reuben Vincent on JuneteenthCharlotte-based lifestyle boutique APB (All Points Bulletin) has unveiled a first look at its Fall/Winter 2026 plans, presenting a collection that expands beyond apparel and footwear into something larger: a cultural ecosystem built around product, place, music and community.Shot entirely inside APB Charlotte at The Collective on Tuckaseegee, the campaign is anchored by Charlotte rapper Reuben Vincent, whose original freestyle serves a
